title: Lattice Surgery Operations: Implementing Logical Gates on Surface Codes
description: Master lattice surgery techniques for implementing logical operations on surface codes. Learn merge and split operations, multi-qubit gates, and routing strategies for large-scale quantum computation.
learningObjectives: Understand the geometry of surface code lattice surgery
Implement merge and split operations for logical measurements
Design multi-qubit Pauli measurements using lattice surgery
Analyze time and space costs of lattice surgery operations
Create routing strategies for non-local operations
Compare lattice surgery with other approaches like braiding
